info.title: Tale Platform API
info.description:
Tale Platform API - Access your Convex backend via REST API.

## Authentication

All API requests require an `x-api-key` header with your API key.

```
x-api-key: your-api-key-here
```

You can create API keys in Settings > API Keys.

## Request Format

All endpoints accept POST requests with JSON body containing an `args` object:

```json
{
  "args": {
    "param1": "value1",
    "param2": "value2"
  }
}
```

tags.name: OpenAI Compatible
tags.description: OpenAI Chat Completions compatible API. Use any OpenAI SDK by pointing base_url to this server.

tags.name: action
tags.description: Functions that can call external APIs

post.summary: Create chat completion
post.description:
Send messages to an agent and receive a response. Fully compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completions API.

**Two modes:**
- **Agent mode** (no `tools`): The agent uses server-side tools and auto-executes them.
- **Client tool mode** (`tools` provided): Only client-defined tools are used. Returns `tool_calls` for client execution.

parameters.name: X-Organization-Slug
parameters.description: Organization slug. Auto-resolved if user belongs to one org.

parameters.name: X-Thread-Id
parameters.description: Reuse a conversation thread across requests.

200.description: Chat completion response (or SSE stream if stream=true)

schema.description: SSE stream of ChatCompletionChunk objects, terminated by `data: [DONE]`

403.description: Not a member of the organization

get.description: List available agents as OpenAI-compatible models. Only agents with `visibleInChat: true` are returned.

200.description: List of models

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Create one in Settings > API Keys.

bearerAuth.description: API key as Bearer token (e.g., "Bearer tale_..."). Create keys in Settings > API Keys.

tools.description: Tool definitions for client-side tool calling. When provided, server-side agent tools are disabled.

tool_call_id.description: ID of the tool call this result is for (tool messages only).

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the function parameters.
